assign_a_permission_set_to_a_user_or: Assign a permission set to a user or group on an AWS account through Identity Center and confirm the assignment completes. Use for just-in-time elevated access.
assignment_provisioning_status_in_progre: Assignment provisioning status (IN_PROGRESS, FAILED, SUCCEEDED) or account status
date_the_account_joined_the_organization: Date the account joined the organization
display_name_of_the_user_or_group: Display name of the user or group
enumerate_permission_sets_group_membersh: Enumerate permission sets, group memberships, and account assignments in Identity Center to produce an access report. Use for compliance and periodic reviews.
failure_reason_if_status_is_failed: Failure reason if status is FAILED
identity_store_group_id_use_as_principal: Identity Store group ID (use as principalId)
identity_store_user_id_use_as_principali: Identity Store user ID (use as principalId)
identity_store_user_or_group_id: Identity Store user or group ID
list_of_account_assignments_accountid_pe: List of account assignments (accountId, permissionSetArn, principalType, principalId)
list_of_aws_accounts_id_arn_name_email: List of AWS accounts (id, arn, name, email, status)
list_of_identity_center_instances_instan: List of Identity Center instances (instanceArn, identityStoreId, name, status, statusReason)
list_of_identity_store_groups_groupid_di: List of Identity Store groups (groupId, displayName, description)
list_of_permission_sets_permissionsetarn: List of permission sets (permissionSetArn, name, description, sessionDuration)
manage_temporary_elevated_access_in_aws_: Manage temporary elevated access in AWS IAM Identity Center
maximum_number_of_results_to_return: Maximum number of results to return
next_page_token_from_previous_request: Next page token from previous request
pagination_token_for_the_next_page: Pagination token for the next page
provision_and_revoke_temporary_access_to: Provision and revoke temporary access to AWS accounts via IAM Identity Center (SSO). Assign permission sets to users or groups, look up users by email, and list accounts and permission sets for access request workflows.
remove_a_permission_set_assignment_from_: Remove a permission set assignment from a user or group in Identity Center and confirm deletion. Use to wind down temporary or expired access.
request_id_for_polling_assignment_status: Request ID for polling assignment status
request_id_from_create_or_delete_assignm: Request ID from Create or Delete Assignment
